message:
data(audit): record fresh-eyes diff audit of messaging/session surface (batch 5ly0j1)

Fresh-eyes diff audit of recently-churned messaging/session and related
session-typed obligation surfaces. Five files audited (~6937 lines), all
SOUND, zero bugs found:

- src/messaging/capability/tokens.rs (715L)
- src/messaging/session/projection.rs (534L)
- src/messaging/session/contract.rs (1530L)
- src/messaging/session/conformance.rs (1712L)
- src/obligation/session_types.rs (2446L)

Verified: linear token semantics (no Copy/Clone + compile-fail doctests),
projection duality invariant wired into contract.validate(), session-type
drop-bomb RAII disarms before returning futures, transport-backed async
methods are cancel-safe on unpolled-drop, conformance monitor handles
degenerate recursion cycles.

Bead asupersync-5ly0j1 closed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
